## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `make validate` (manifest + skill frontmatter)
- [ ] Ran `make test` (all tests pass)
- [ ] If a new snippet was added, verified YAML/JSON is valid
- [ ] If a skill description was changed, verified routing/disambiguation prose in the relevant SKILL.md `## MCP tools` sections + IDE snippets still makes sense
- [ ] Commits are signed off — `git commit -s` (DCO 1.1 required; see [CONTRIBUTING.md § DCO](CONTRIBUTING.md#developer-certificate-of-origin-dco))
